fix_instructions.Analytics: Check API connection and credentials in Analytics agent settings → ensure API key is valid and properly configured
fix_instructions.Revenue Tracker: Review Revenue Tracker agent configuration → verify that YouTube API connection is established and earnings data is being fetched correctly
fix_instructions.SEO Optimizer: Inspect SEO Optimizer agent logs → identify and resolve any errors or warnings related to SEO update applications
fix_instructions.Instagram: Instagram agent is missing INSTAGRAM_ACCESS_TOKEN in GitHub Secrets → go to Settings → Secrets → add it
fix_instructions.Video Reviewer: Configure Video Reviewer agent to fetch video data from YouTube API → ensure API connection is established and video data is being fetched correctly
